description: Blocks destructive cloud CLI commands across AWS, GCP, Azure, Terraform, Kubernetes, DigitalOcean, Pulumi, Docker, and GitHub. Prevents accidental database deletion, storage wipe, infrastructure destruction, DNS removal, IAM purge, and IaC destroy.

rules.name: cloud_database_destroy
rules.description: Blocks cloud database deletion commands (AWS RDS/DynamoDB/Redshift/ElastiCache/DocumentDB/Neptune/Keyspaces, GCP Cloud SQL/Firestore/Spanner/Bigtable, Azure SQL/CosmosDB/PostgreSQL/MySQL/Redis, DigitalOcean databases)

rules.name: cloud_storage_destroy
rules.description: Blocks cloud storage/bucket destruction (AWS S3 rb/rm --recursive, GCP gsutil rm -r/storage buckets delete, Azure storage account/container delete)

rules.name: cloud_infra_destroy
rules.description: Blocks cloud infrastructure destruction (EC2 terminate, EKS/GKE/AKS cluster delete, CloudFormation stack delete, GCP project delete, Azure resource group delete, DigitalOcean droplet/cluster delete)

rules.name: cloud_dns_domain_destroy
rules.description: Blocks DNS zone/domain deletion (AWS Route53, GCP DNS, Azure DNS, Cloudflare wrangler, DigitalOcean domains)

rules.name: cloud_iam_key_destroy
rules.description: Blocks IAM/key/secret deletion (AWS IAM users/roles/keys, KMS schedule-key-deletion, Secrets Manager, GCP service accounts/KMS, Azure AD/Key Vault)

rules.name: iac_destroy
rules.description: Blocks infrastructure-as-code destroy commands (terraform destroy/state rm/force-unlock, tofu destroy, pulumi destroy, cdk destroy)

rules.name: k8s_critical_destroy
rules.description: Blocks Kubernetes critical resource deletion (kubectl delete namespace/pvc/pv/crd, helm uninstall)

rules.name: repo_registry_destroy
rules.description: Blocks repository/registry destruction (gh repo delete, ECR delete-repository, GCP artifacts delete, Azure ACR delete, docker system/volume prune)
